sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Turn your ear, O Lord, and answer me; save the servants who trust in you, my God. Have mercy on me, O Lord, for I cry to you all the day long.

sections.author: Francesca LaRosa
sections.snippet: Go out to all the world and tell the Good News.

sections.author: SP2025
sections.snippet: I am the way, the truth and the life, says the Lord; no one comes to the Father, except through me.

sections.title: You Stand Knocking
sections.author: Tom Booth
sections.snippet: You spoke my name, and took my hand, and called me friend. Such faithful love, so undeserved, a heart transformed. Though I wandered and have strayed, Still your mercy reigns.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: Whoever eats my flesh and drinks my blood has eternal life, says the Lord, and I will raise him up the last day.

sections.title: All That We Have Seen
sections.author: Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: All that we have seen, we will not hide away. We will hold it up as the light of day; a lamp of mercy meant to guide and lead carried to the least. We will show the world all that we have seen.

sections.title: Gratitude
sections.author: Brandon Lake, Dante Bowe and Benjamin Hastings
sections.snippet: All my words fall short; I got nothing new. How could I express all my gratitude ?

sections.title: Walk Together Children
sections.author: Traditional African American Spiritua
sections.snippet: Walk together, children, don't you get weary. Walk together, children, don't you get weary; Walk together, children, don't you get weary. We will walk for justice in this great land.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
